heading: Eligibility for environmental restoration and pollution abatement
label: 328 Eligibility for environmental restoration and pollution abatement

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Subject to subsection (b), environmental restoration and pollution abatement to minimize or mitigate the impacts of any transportation project funded under this title (including retrofitting and construction of stormwater treatment systems to meet Federal and State requirements under sections 401 and 402 of the Federal Water Pollution Control Act (; 1342)) may be carried out to address water pollution or environmental degradation caused wholly or partially by a transportation facility.33 U.S.C. 1341

children.heading: .—Maximum Expenditure
children.label: b .—Maximum Expenditure
children.text: In a case in which a transportation facility is undergoing reconstruction, rehabilitation, resurfacing, or restoration, the expenditure of funds under this section for environmental restoration or pollution abatement described in subsection (a) shall not exceed 20 percent of the total cost of the reconstruction, rehabilitation, resurfacing, or restoration of the facility.
